tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceAttachCustomerManagedPolicyReferenceToPermissionSet.attachCustomerManagedPolicyReferenceToPermissionSet
tools.description: Attaches the specified customer managed policy to the specified PermissionSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceAttachManagedPolicyToPermissionSet.attachManagedPolicyToPermissionSet
tools.description:
Attaches an AWS managed policy ARN to a permission set.

If the permission set is already referenced by one or more account assignments, you will need to call ProvisionPermissionSet after this operation. Calling ProvisionPermissionSet applies the corresponding IAM policy updates to all assigned accounts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceCreateAccountAssignment.createAccountAssignment
tools.description:
Assigns access to a principal for a specified AWS account using a specified permission set.

The term principal here refers to a user or group that is defined in IAM Identity Center.

As part of a successful CreateAccountAssignment call, the specified permission set will automatically be provisioned to the account in the form of an IAM policy. That policy is attached to the IAM role created in IAM Identity Center. If the permission set is subsequently updated, the corresponding IAM policies attached to roles in your accounts will not be updated automatically. In this case, you must call ProvisionPermissionSet to make these updates.

After a successful response, call DescribeAccountAssignmentCreationStatus to describe the status of an assignment creation request.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceCreateInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration.createInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration
tools.description:
Enables the attributes-based access control (ABAC) feature for the specified IAM Identity Center instance. You can also specify new attributes to add to your ABAC configuration during the enabling process. For more information about ABAC, see Attribute-Based Access Control in the IAM Identity Center User Guide.

After a successful response, call DescribeInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration to validate that InstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration was created.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceCreatePermissionSet.createPermissionSet
tools.description:
Creates a permission set within a specified IAM Identity Center instance.

To grant users and groups access to AWS account resources, use CreateAccountAssignment .

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDeleteAccountAssignment.deleteAccountAssignment
tools.description:
Deletes a principal's access from a specified AWS account using a specified permission set.

After a successful response, call DescribeAccountAssignmentCreationStatus to describe the status of an assignment deletion request.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDeleteInlinePolicyFromPermissionSet.deleteInlinePolicyFromPermissionSet
tools.description: Deletes the inline policy from a specified permission set.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDeleteInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration.deleteInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration
tools.description: Disables the attributes-based access control (ABAC) feature for the specified IAM Identity Center instance and deletes all of the attribute mappings that have been configured. Once deleted, any attributes that are received from an identity source and any custom attributes you have previously configured will not be passed. For more information about ABAC, see Attribute-Based Access Control in the IAM Identity Center User Guide.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDeletePermissionsBoundaryFromPermissionSet.deletePermissionsBoundaryFromPermissionSet
tools.description: Deletes the permissions boundary from a specified PermissionSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDeletePermissionSet.deletePermissionSet
tools.description: Deletes the specified permission set.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDescribeAccountAssignmentCreationStatus.describeAccountAssignmentCreationStatus
tools.description: Describes the status of the assignment creation request.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDescribeAccountAssignmentDeletionStatus.describeAccountAssignmentDeletionStatus
tools.description: Describes the status of the assignment deletion request.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDescribeInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration.describeInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration
tools.description: Returns the list of IAM Identity Center identity store attributes that have been configured to work with attributes-based access control (ABAC) for the specified IAM Identity Center instance. This will not return attributes configured and sent by an external identity provider. For more information about ABAC, see Attribute-Based Access Control in the IAM Identity Center User Guide.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDescribePermissionSet.describePermissionSet
tools.description: Gets the details of the permission set.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDescribePermissionSetProvisioningStatus.describePermissionSetProvisioningStatus
tools.description: Describes the status for the given permission set provisioning request.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDetachCustomerManagedPolicyReferenceFromPermissionSet.detachCustomerManagedPolicyReferenceFromPermissionSet
tools.description: Detaches the specified customer managed policy from the specified PermissionSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceDetachManagedPolicyFromPermissionSet.detachManagedPolicyFromPermissionSet
tools.description: Detaches the attached AWS managed policy ARN from the specified permission set.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceGetInlinePolicyForPermissionSet.getInlinePolicyForPermissionSet
tools.description: Obtains the inline policy assigned to the permission set.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceGetPermissionsBoundaryForPermissionSet.getPermissionsBoundaryForPermissionSet
tools.description: Obtains the permissions boundary for a specified PermissionSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListAccountAssignmentCreationStatus.listAccountAssignmentCreationStatus
tools.description: Lists the status of the AWS account assignment creation requests for a specified IAM Identity Center instance.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListAccountAssignmentDeletionStatus.listAccountAssignmentDeletionStatus
tools.description: Lists the status of the AWS account assignment deletion requests for a specified IAM Identity Center instance.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListAccountAssignments.listAccountAssignments
tools.description: Lists the assignee of the specified AWS account with the specified permission set.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListAccountsForProvisionedPermissionSet.listAccountsForProvisionedPermissionSet
tools.description: Lists all the AWS accounts where the specified permission set is provisioned.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListCustomerManagedPolicyReferencesInPermissionSet.listCustomerManagedPolicyReferencesInPermissionSet
tools.description: Lists all customer managed policies attached to a specified PermissionSet.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListInstances.listInstances
tools.description: Lists the IAM Identity Center instances that the caller has access to.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListManagedPoliciesInPermissionSet.listManagedPoliciesInPermissionSet
tools.description: Lists the AWS managed policy that is attached to a specified permission set.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListPermissionSetProvisioningStatus.listPermissionSetProvisioningStatus
tools.description: Lists the status of the permission set provisioning requests for a specified IAM Identity Center instance.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListPermissionSets.listPermissionSets
tools.description: Lists the PermissionSets in an IAM Identity Center instance.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListPermissionSetsProvisionedToAccount.listPermissionSetsProvisionedToAccount
tools.description: Lists all the permission sets that are provisioned to a specified AWS account.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceListTagsForResource.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Lists the tags that are attached to a specified resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceProvisionPermissionSet.provisionPermissionSet
tools.description: The process by which a specified permission set is provisioned to the specified target.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServicePutInlinePolicyToPermissionSet.putInlinePolicyToPermissionSet
tools.description:
Attaches an inline policy to a permission set.

If the permission set is already referenced by one or more account assignments, you will need to call ProvisionPermissionSet after this action to apply the corresponding IAM policy updates to all assigned accounts.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServicePutPermissionsBoundaryToPermissionSet.putPermissionsBoundaryToPermissionSet
tools.description: Attaches an AWS managed or customer managed policy to the specified PermissionSet as a permissions boundary.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceTagResource.tagResource
tools.description: Associates a set of tags with a specified resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceUntagResource.untagResource
tools.description: Disassociates a set of tags from a specified resource.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceUpdateInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration.updateInstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration
tools.description: Updates the IAM Identity Center identity store attributes that you can use with the IAM Identity Center instance for attributes-based access control (ABAC). When using an external identity provider as an identity source, you can pass attributes through the SAML assertion as an alternative to configuring attributes from the IAM Identity Center identity store. If a SAML assertion passes any of these attributes, IAM Identity Center replaces the attribute value with the value from the IAM Identity Center identity store. For more information about ABAC, see Attribute-Based Access Control in the IAM Identity Center User Guide.

tools.name: xAmzTargetSwbExternalServiceUpdatePermissionSet.updatePermissionSet
tools.description: Updates an existing permission set.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
